evidence_direction_note: [multi_sense_audit_2026_05_08_eval_asymmetric] AST-flagged for multi-sense in inner loop. The eval loop calls sense() at line 519 (no_grad), then conditionally calls sense() again at line 551 to obtain a differentiable z_self for the hopfield gradient step. This re-sense fires only when hopfield_enabled (the ON arm). ON arm: 2x substrate ticks per env state; OFF arm: 1x. The two arms therefore ran under structurally different substrate dynamics (GABA decay rate, AIC EMA rate, V_s readouts, anchor-set hysteresis, broadcast_override EMA). The 'mixed MECH-118' direction is invalidated: any difference between arms could be the substrate-rate confound rather than the hopfield familiarity mechanism. Supersede; re-run via StepHarness.
